CustomField.description: Identifies which transactional flow this Order represents (Join = new membership, Renew = membership renewal). Set by the originating LWC at cart create. Read by PromoCodeApplyService to validate Promo_Code__c.Applicable_To__c. Null is treated as Join for backwards compatibility.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Set by the originating checkout flow. Null is treated as Join.
CustomField.label: Flow Type
